case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. PETER M. WALL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT(S);NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2) (TRANSACTION ID # 56710497) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-10-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. SERVED AUG-16-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALL, PETER M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALL, PETER M. $8,531.32 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,531.32, (TRANSACTION ID # 56710497)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $52.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100023529) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 200007869) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WALL, PETER M.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WALL, PETER M. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-20-2015
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $299.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $500.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 56710497) AS TO DEFENDANT WALL, PETER M.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALL, PETER M.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALL, PETER M.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56710497) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.
